name: RIS Academic Ingest

parameters.command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job academic_ingest

notes: RIS PILOT SCOPE: Calls research-scheduler run-job academic_ingest. Runs ArXiv academic paper ingestion every 12 hours. No optional dependencies required (ArXiv only -- SSRN not supported). MUTUAL EXCLUSION: Do NOT activate this cron trigger while APScheduler (ris-scheduler container) is running -- this causes double-scheduling. Stop APScheduler first: docker compose stop ris-scheduler. Do NOT add strategy, gate, risk, or live capital logic to this workflow. See docs/adr/0013-ris-n8n-pilot-scoped.md for scope boundaries. Command: docker exec polytool-ris-scheduler python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job academic_ingest.
